name: OpenCode CLI
description: OpenCode warga (external forge instrument) — provider-agnostic coding harness bound to 333-AGI (Δ MIND). A2A mesh citizen via 777 FORGE. Provider-agnostic CLI harness: tokenplan-mimo/MiMo-v2.5-pro primary, MiniMax M2.7/M3/M2.5-HS subagents. Auto-discovers MCP tools at session init. F1-F13 floors enforced. HEXAGON external warga v3.0.0.

bearer.description: arifOS session token issued via arif_session_init

apiKey.name: X-ArifOS-Key
apiKey.description: Static API key for organ-to-organ federation calls

skills.name: Federation Coding Agent
skills.description: Meta-playbook for cross-repo federation work. Routing, governance, execution, validation, audit, seal. Spans all 7 organs. HIGH risk. F1-F13 enforced.
examples: Plan a multi-organ task across GEOX and WEALTH

skills.name: arifOS MCP Federation
skills.description: Route tasks across two or more federation MCP servers, sequence tool calls, define fallbacks when an organ substrate fails. Δ axis primary.
examples: Sequence GEOX seismic + WEALTH NPV for prospect eval
Route WELL readiness check before A-FORGE execution

skills.name: Autonomous Governed Execution
skills.description: ASI-tier autonomous governed execution. 4 primitives (agentic reflex, safety floor, verify-before-report, evidence-cite-or-UNKNOWN). T1/T2/T3 tier table, F1-F13 floor.
examples: Execute a build under T1 autonomy
Handle a T3 irreversible action with 888_HOLD

skills.name: Agentic Session Init
skills.description: Unified bootstrap: reality check → skill load → organ attest → session bind. Mandatory first action for any governed agent session.
examples: Initialize a new opencode session with organ attest
Verify all 7 organs are alive before execution

skills.name: GitHub Workflow
skills.description: GitHub operations — auth, repo management, PR lifecycle, issues, code review. F1, F11 enforced.
examples: Create a PR with evidence receipts
Check CI status on a pending merge

skills.name: Auditor Validator Kutip Sampah
skills.description: Immune system / cleaner skill. Audit, validate, clean junk, detect drift/corruption. HIGH risk.
